report.summary: Day 71 cycle-close v4: No delta from v3 — zero new commits, zero new deploys. 728 uncommitted file changes (48 modified vs HEAD). Egress still blocked. Vercel trial likely expired (Day 9 past expiry window). 42 TS errors unchanged. /trading hub still 404.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: EGRESS BLOCKED: Cannot verify production pages from sandbox. degen0x.com unreachable (network proxy).
NO NEW FILES since v3 report. 3 locally-created files (2 learn pages + WalletSecurityScoreCalculator) remain uncommitted.

TYPESCRIPT ERRORS: 42 errors across 2 files — unchanged. Files: src/lib/structured-data.examples.ts (JSX in non-JSX file, 38 errors), src/app/learn/crypto-index-funds-guide-2026/page.tsx (unescaped > in JSX, 4 errors).
728 uncommitted file changes total (48 modified files vs HEAD, plus untracked workspace files like .skill files, docs, reports).
PUBLISHED PAGES: 473 slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES. 103 slugs lack dedicated page.tsx (served by dynamic [slug] route for /learn/*).
404 CARRY-OVER [P1]: /trading hub page.tsx MISSING. /compare/exchanges dynamic [slug] route MISSING (compare pages may be hardcoded only).
BUILD: Cannot run full production build in sandbox (OOM/Bus error). Last successful Vercel build was 4m 11s on Mar 17.

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: EGRESS BLOCKED: No live API health checks possible from sandbox.
ALL 7 API ROUTE FILES VERIFIED: /api/health, /api/prices, /api/trending, /api/fear-greed, /api/market-dominance, /api/market-metrics, /api/defi-yields — all route.ts files present and unchanged.
CACHE HEADERS: All 7 data routes reference cache/revalidation logic. No code changes to caching since last cycle.

RATE LIMITER: Only /api/health and /api/cache-stats import rate limiter. Core data routes (prices, trending, fear-greed, market-dominance, market-metrics, defi-yields) remain UNPROTECTED — carry-over P1.
FALLBACK DATA: /api/defi-yields has 0 fallback references — carry-over P1. If upstream (DefiLlama) fails, route will return error.
NO CODE CHANGES to any API route since last cycle.

sections.title: DevOps
items: EGRESS BLOCKED: Cannot verify Vercel deployment from sandbox.
NO NEW COMMITS: Last commit e999560 on Mar 17 — 'publish: promote 2 pages to production (Day 62)'. Pipeline idle for 7 days.
CRITICAL [P0]: Vercel trial was '2 days remaining' as of Mar 22. Now Mar 24 — trial almost certainly EXPIRED. Site likely down or build-blocked. Jefe must add payment method.
48 MODIFIED FILES uncommitted vs HEAD, including layout.tsx, globals.css, sitemap.ts, and multiple page files. These represent significant work that has never been deployed.
BUILD SANDBOX: Local build OOM (Bus error in constrained VM). Not indicative of production build health.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: Nothing. Zero commits, zero deploys since v3 report.
CRITICAL BLOCKER [P0]: Vercel trial expired. ALL deployments blocked until billing resolved. This is the #1 action item for Jefe.
BLOCKER [P1]: 48 modified files sitting uncommitted for 7+ days. Risk of merge conflicts or lost work increasing.
BLOCKER [P1]: /trading hub page still missing — carry-over from multiple cycles.
BLOCKER [P1]: 42 TypeScript errors in 2 files must be fixed before next clean commit.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: Rate limiter not wired on 6 core API routes (only health + cache-stats protected).
CARRY-OVER [P1]: /api/defi-yields lacks fallback data on upstream failure.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 103 orphan slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES without dedicated page.tsx (likely served by dynamic [slug] routes).
NEXT CYCLE PRIORITIES: (1) Resolve Vercel billing P0, (2) Fix 42 TS errors, (3) Commit + deploy 48 modified files, (4) Create /trading hub page, (5) Wire rate limiter on API routes.
